name: Manticore Venom Injection
miss: [AttackerName]'s tail clamps down on [TargetName]'s shaft and strokes it with its unnatural insides, but [TargetName] manages to endure it!
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] gives [TargetName] a sinister smile, tightly clinging to [TargetHimOrHer] while [AttackerHisOrHer] tail relentlessly milks [TargetHisOrHer] dick, [AttackerName] reaches back and takes one of [AttackerHisOrHer] aphrodisiac filled spines off of [AttackerHisOrHer] tail, and gently injects it directly into [TargetName]'s neck, making [TargetHimOrHer] gasp as the venom floods [TargetHisOrHer] body.
statusMiss: [AttackerName] gives [TargetName] a sinister smile, and reaches back, taking one of [AttackerHisOrHer] aphrodisiac filled spines off of [AttackerHisOrHer] tail, but [TargetName] thrashes too much, making [AttackerName] drop the venom filled needle.
